monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Attacks Kill Over 4,300 in Lebanon Since March 2
— S4 · Humanitarian · Beirut, Lebanon · 7h ago. Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon since March 2 rises to 4,303, according to official reports.

Israel Strikes Southern Lebanon's Mansouri and Tallousah
— S3 · Conflict · Mansouri, Lebanon · 1h ago. State media reports Israeli airstrikes hit the villages of Mansouri and Tallousah in southern Lebanon, targeting Hezbollah positions.
